name: SOC Home Lab Detection Coverage
description: ATT&CK techniques exercised in the AWS SOC home lab. GREEN = validated (attack run, detection captured). AMBER = documented walkthrough, not yet run. Each maps to a walkthrough in screenshots/.

techniques.comment: WT03/04/05 - Exploit public-facing app: DVWA SQLi, vsftpd backdoor (CVE-2011-2523), Samba usermap (CVE-2007-2447). DOCUMENTED.
WT02 - SSH password guessing (Hydra) -> Wazuh 5712 -> TheHive -> Cortex. DOCUMENTED.
WT06 - AD password spraying (Windows 4625 burst) -> Wazuh. DOCUMENTED.
Steal or Forge Kerberos Tickets (parent). See Kerberoasting.
OS Credential Dumping (parent). See LSASS Memory.
WT07 - LSASS memory access (Sysmon EID 10) -> Wazuh. DOCUMENTED.
WT08 - Caldera Sandcat C2 beaconing (Zeek conn cadence + Sysmon EID 3). DOCUMENTED.
WT08 - System information discovery (Caldera, Sysmon EID 1). DOCUMENTED.
WT08 - Process discovery (Caldera, Sysmon EID 1). DOCUMENTED.
WT08 - System owner/user discovery (Caldera, Sysmon EID 1). DOCUMENTED.
WT08 - System network configuration discovery (Caldera, Sysmon EID 1). DOCUMENTED.
